---
name: Documentation
about: Report missing, outdated, or unclear documentation
title: '[docs] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Where

Which page, section, or file? (URL or path.)

## What's Wrong

- [ ] Missing — needed but not written
- [ ] Outdated — describes old behavior
- [ ] Incorrect — wrong information
- [ ] Unclear — accurate but hard to follow
- [ ] Broken link / formatting / code sample

## Details

What did you expect to find, and what's actually there?

## Suggested Fix

Optional. If you have a specific wording in mind, share it here.
